name: Simon Says Game
description: A playable Simon memory-game FSM (LED playback, button replay, growing sequence, game-over), adapted from Uri Shaked's Tiny Tapeout tt06-simon-game (commit 37f3538), taken spec -> lint -> sim -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 1125 std cells; 2.91 mW
Original self-checking TB plays a full game (observe LEDs, replay, wrong-input loss) — TEST PASSED
Interactive: open simon_game.dashboard.html and play the real netlist (compiled at TICKS_PER_MILLI=1 for browser speed)
source_note: Game core adapted from urish/tt06-simon-game (simon.v is MIT (c) 2023 Uri Shaked; repo LICENSE Apache-2.0; both shipped/attributed); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
